Exercises Pricing Download
30 exercises. 5 types. One score.

Your brain on AI...
isn't what it was.

You paste questions instead of thinking them through. You let autocomplete finish your thoughts. Lucid is 5 minutes of going the other direction.

Free to try. 7 exercises a day.

You already know it's happening.

You search for things you used to know. You reach for AI before trying yourself. The ability to hold an idea in your head and work through it — that gets weaker when you don't use it.

Every neurologist who studies this says the same thing: the pathway only exists if you use it. Lucid exists because someone built an AI assistant app and then noticed his own thinking getting worse.

A feed of exercises,
not a feed of content

Every card in the feed is a short cognitive challenge — anagram solving, word recall, pattern recognition, logic puzzles, creative writing prompts, spatial reasoning. 30 different types, sequenced so your brain can't fall into a pattern.

Sessions take 4-6 minutes. The variety is the point. You can't get good at one thing and call it done.

Your Autonomy Score

It's a number between 0 and 100 that tracks your raw cognitive performance across 5 domains: word recall, spatial reasoning, logic, creativity, and pattern recognition. Not how long you've used the app. Not your streak count. Actual performance.

The average new user scores 67. Most users gain 8-12 points in their first 30 days. When the number moves, it's because your brain moved.

30 card types.
Nothing repeats.

Word anagrams. Memory sequences. Odd-one-out. Creative constraints. Analogical reasoning. Math from first principles. Visual pattern matching. Directional spatial challenges.

Each exercise type targets a different cognitive pathway. The feed algorithm weights toward your weakest areas so you're always working the muscles that need it.

30

Different exercise types

5 min

Average session

8–12 pts

Average Autonomy Score gain in 30 days

5 types of thinking.

Each one targets a distinct cognitive pathway. Together they cover the full range of what your brain does when it works independently.

Word & Language

Anagram solving, word recall, vocabulary building, creative writing under constraints.

Logic & Reasoning

Syllogisms, sequence completion, deductive puzzles. Holding multiple conditions in mind at once.

Spatial & Visual

Pattern rotation, mirror symmetry, shape matching. The kind of thinking GPS has replaced.

Memory

Sequence recall, detail retention, working memory span. Short-term storage you haven't been using.

Creative

Open prompts, unconventional uses, metaphor generation. Divergent thinking is a skill too.

Attention

Odd-one-out, selective focus, distraction filtering. The thing notifications have been destroying.

Free to start.

7 exercises every day, free. No account required.

AI isn't going away. But you don't have to let it think for you.
